title: Certificate Course in Art of Anchoring & Presentation (In association with India Today Media Institute)
content: "Well-communicated is half the battle won - and well-presented is the other half" In today’s world, whether you're a media professional, entrepreneur, educator, or leader, your ability to communicate with clarity and presence defines your impact. Many talented individuals struggle to make a lasting impression simply because they lack the tools to present themselves effectively - missing out on opportunities to connect, influence, and inspire. This certificate program - Art of Anchoring & Presentation - has been thoughtfully designed by India Today Group experts / media professionals who carry decades of experience. It offers comprehensive, hands-on training in the fundamentals of public speaking, body language, stage presence, and personal branding - culminating in mastery of anchoring and broadcast skills. Whether you aim to shine on TV, lead powerful presentations, host podcasts, or simply elevate your professional persona, this program delivers practical, real-world learning in a live media environment. The course ensures that every concept taught is immediately put into action - making it an essential investment for professionals looking to stand out and lead with confidence. Note: Commencement of Batch-2 classes Class XII with minimum 50% aggregate marks and Basic Computer literacy required Working Professionals can also apply Contact us for more Information - 9560065465 | 9560065496 01 Equip participants with essential communication and presentation skills to confidently engage diverse audiences across media platforms. 02 Train learners in voice modulation, body language, and on-camera presence to enhance personal and professional delivery. 03 Develop proficiency in anchoring, interviewing, and content creation tailored for television, radio, podcast, and digital platforms. 04 Provide hands-on exposure through live broadcast simulations, mentorship, and real-world media environments. 05 Foster the ability to handle high-pressure presentation scenarios and strengthen individual personal branding for media and public engagements. 01 Develop strong communication skills 02 Strong verbal & Nonverbal communication 03 Confidence and effective delivery 04 Mastery over presentation tools 05 Expertise in voice modulation, body language, self-image projection 06 Creating engaging scripts for diverse media formats 07 Mastering the dynamics of conducting interviews, group discussions. 08 Understanding new trends in radio, podcasts, digital media. 09 Effectively handle challenges in live presentations, 10 Real-world media exposure, live broadcast participation, and mentorship 11 More impactful Personal Branding
